titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/163

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=365 status=live modified=2017-02-24 14:07:33.764542+00 | translation moa=366 status=live modified=2017-02-24 14:07:36.64375+00

div.p:
UNIUERSIS sancte matris ecclesie filiis presentibus et futuris . Ysabel uxor Willelmi de Ridale salutem  Sciatis me dedisse et concessisse
et hac mea carta confirmasse deo et ecclesie sancte . Marie . de melros . et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus . pro salute domini patricii de Ridale . et Walteri filii eius . et Willelmi
sponsi mei . et pro salute mea . et pro animabus omnium antecessorum et successorum nostrorum . illam bouatam terre in territorio de Whittun . quam pater meus Willelmus persona de
Hunum emit a Gaufrido coco . et mihi donauit cum carta predicti . G. et confirmatione domini . P . de Ridale . simul . per has diuisas sicut eadem bouata terre iacet inter
Hordlawe et tockesheles . et inter fossatum de Harhov et dotem matildis corbeth . et sicut tractus sulci circuit eam per predictas diuisas . Totam
hanc terram et quicquid continetur infra predictas diuisas dedi eisdem monachis . in liberam . puram . et perpetuam elemosinam et solutam ab omni terreno serui
cio . et consuetudine . et exactione seculari . ut ea habeant . teneant . et possideant inperpetuum . ita libere . quiete . plene . et honorifice . sicut aliquam elemo
sinam . liberius . quietius . plenius . et honorificentius . tenent uel possident . Et ego et heredes mei manutenebimus . et warantizabimus . predictis mona
chis hanc elemosinam contra omnes homines . et adquietabimus de omni seruicio inperpetuum . Et ut hec mea donatio firma sit et stabile . ego iuraui tactis
sacrosanctis ewangeliis in facie ecclesie . coram probis hominibus . que nec ego . nec aliquis heredum meorum . artem uel ingenium queremus . unde domus de melros
in posterum de eadem terra . aliquod dampnum incurrere possit uel grauamen . Testibus . Domino patricio de Ridale . Waltero filio eius de Ridale . Willelmo
sponso meo . Willelmo filio nostro . Patricio filio Walteri . de Ridale . Radulfo de Ridale . Roberto de bernoldebi . Alexandro clerico . Reginaldo homine persone .
Adam de hunteley . Henrico de heriz . Waltero filio . G . coc' . Gaufrido filio henrici de neuhbotle . Willelmo filio mabile . Willelmo
nepote . domini . P . de Ridale . et multis . Aliis .

TO ALL sons of Holy Mother Church present and future Isabel wife of William of Ryedale sends greeting. Know me to have given and granted and by this my charter to have made firm to God and to the church of St Mary at Melrose and the monks serving God in that place, for the salvation of the lord Patrick of Ryedale, and Walter his son, and William my spouse, and for my own salvation, and for the souls of all our ancestors and successors, the oxgang of land in the territory of Whitton that my father William, the parson of Hownam, bought from Geoffrey the cook, and donated to me along with the charter of the foresaid Geoffrey and the confirmation of Patrick of Ryedale together, by these boundaries, as the same oxgang of land falls between Hardlaw and Shielstockbraes, and between the fosse of Harrow and the dower-land of Matilda Corbet, and as the course of the ditch goes around it by the foresaid boundaries. I have given this whole land and whatever is contained within the foresaid boundaries to the same monks in free, pure, and perpetual alms and released from every earthly service, custom, and secular exaction, that they may have, hold and possess it for ever, as freely, quitely, fully, and honourably as they hold or possess any alms freely, quitely, fully, and honourably. And I and my heirs shall maintain and warrant this alms to the foresaid monks against all men, and acquit it of every service for ever. And that this my donation should be firm and fixed I have sworn by holding the holy gospels in the presence of the church before worthy men; and neither I, nor any of my heirs, shall seek to challenge it by art or cunning from which the house of Melrose could in future incur any loss or injury in respect of the same land. As witnesses, the lord Patrick of Ryedale; Walter of Ryedale, his son; William my spouse; William our son; Patrick son of Walter of Ryedale; Ralph of Ryedale; Robert of Barnoldby; Alexander the clerk; Reginald the parson's man; Adam of Huntly; Henry de Heriz; Walter son of Geoffrey Cook; Geoffrey son of Henry of Newbattle; William son of Mabilla; William nephew of the lord Patrick of Ryedale; and many others.
